display.purpose: Session titles and single hero lines per region.

title.purpose: Exercise names, card headers, sidebar sections.

mono.purpose: Code artifacts and editor surfaces only.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Rare card lift in dark mode only.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: UI entrances; prefer over bounce curves.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action on dark surfaces: start set, confirm, navigate forward.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(70.4% 0.14 182.503); color: oklch(0.195 0 0); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(70.4% 0.14 182.503 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.45 0 0); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions: delete set, icon controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.27 0 0); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.165 0 0 / 0.3); color: oklch(0.94 0 0); font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.165 0 0 / 0.5); border-color: oklch(0.4 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Set Input
components.description: Weight and reps fields in the set logger; centered numerals.
components.css: .ds-input-set { width: 100%; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.27 0 0); border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.165 0 0 / 0.5); color: oklch(0.94 0 0); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; text-align: center; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input-set::placeholder { color: oklch(0.6 0 0); } .ds-input-set:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.45 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.45 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Exercise Card
components.description: Active exercise panel with flat tonal surface and quiet border.
components.css: .ds-exercise-card { background: oklch(0.225 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.27 0 0 / 0.5); border-radius: 0.625rem; padding: 1rem; color: oklch(0.94 0 0); } .ds-exercise-title { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.025em; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-exercise-meta { margin: 0.25rem 0 0; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.6 0 0); }

components.name: Rest Timer Badge
components.description: Compact timer chip during rest periods.
components.html: 1:30
components.css: .ds-timer-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(70.4% 0.14 182.503 / 0.15); color: oklch(70.4% 0.14 182.503); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Chat history or exercise list item in the sidebar rail.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: oklch(0.6 0 0); font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0 0 / 0.06); color: oklch(0.94 0 0); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(0.94 0 0 / 0.06); color: oklch(0.94 0 0); font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview: Gymbo looks like one disciplined workspace where a calm coach and a precise logbook sit side by side. Density follows Linear and Raycast: tight type, clear hierarchy, no decorative chrome. The lifter is on the gym floor between sets; the UI stays legible in dim light, responds one-handed, and never competes with the rep.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first gym-floor canvas with stepped neutral surfaces
System sans with negative tracking on headings
Set row as the signature component
Chat and routine shells share sidebar vocabulary

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Teal occupies ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Exercise cards and set rows stay flat. Shadows appear only on float states.

rules.name: The Gym Floor Rule
rules.body: Minimum 14px for anything the lifter must read between sets.

dos: Do treat Signal Teal as a scarce signal
Do keep chat and routine shells at equal visual weight
Do use tonal surface steps for depth in dark mode
Do size touch targets to at least 28–36px on set controls
donts: Don't use spreadsheet or admin-table aesthetics
Don't use default AI chatbot chrome
Don't add colored left-stripe borders on cards
Don't use gradient text for emphasis
